ddls:
CREATE TABLE "guide_rnas" (
  "guide_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the guide RNA */,
  "guide_seq" TEXT /* Sequence of the guide RNA */,
  "guide_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the guide RNA */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the guide RNA was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the guide RNA was last updated */,
  "design_method" TEXT /* Method used to design the guide RNA */,
  "target_gene" TEXT /* Target gene of the guide RNA */,
  "target_region" TEXT /* Target region of the guide RNA (e.g., exon, intron) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "off_targets" (
  "off_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the off-target sequence */,
  "guide_id" TEXT /* Reference to the guide RNA associated with the off-target */,
  "off_target_seq" TEXT /* Sequence of the off-target */,
  "mismatch_pos" TEXT /* String representing positions of mismatches in the off-target sequence */,
  "mismatch_count" INTEGER /* Number of mismatches in the off-target sequence */,
  "mit_offtarget_score" REAL /* MIT off-target score for the off-target sequence */,
  "cfd_offtarget_score" REAL /* CFD off-target score for the off-target sequence */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome where the off-target is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the off-target in the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the off-target in the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the off-target sequence */,
  "locus_desc" TEXT /* Locus description of the off-target site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the off-target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the off-target was last updated */,
  "off_target_type" TEXT /* Type of off-target (e.g., gene, intergenic) */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Functional impact of the off-target (e.g., frameshift, synonymous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("off_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_off_targets_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guide_rnas ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genomic region */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome where the region is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the region in the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the region in the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the region */,
  "locus_desc" TEXT /* Locus description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the genomic region (e.g., exon, intron, intergenic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region was last updated */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Associated gene ID */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Associated transcript ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was last updated */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., knockout, knockdown) */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Cell type used in the experiment */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of replicates for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_guide_rnas" (
  "experiment_guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment-guide RNA link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "guide_id" TEXT /* ID of the guide RNA */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was last updated */,
  "guide_rna_role" TEXT /* Role of the guide RNA in the experiment (e.g., target, control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_guide_rnas_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_guide_rnas_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guide_rnas ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "off_target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the off-target sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the off-target sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the off-target sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the off-target sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_off_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("off_target_id") REFERENCES off_targets ("off_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access_logs" (
  "experiment_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment access log was last updated */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genomic database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the genomic database */,
  "database_type" TEXT /* Type of the genomic database (e.g., gene annotation, variant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic database */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the genomic database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the database was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic database providing the annotation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic region being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., gene symbol, variant classification) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_annotations_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES genomic_databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_annotations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES genomic_regions ("region_id")
)
